last_updated: 2026-07-08 — gate now synthesizes CONCRETE, localizable self-fix solutions (concreteSolution() in scripts/sentry-prealpha-gate.mjs): HTTP-error findings point at the owning route + auto-register mount; founder-chat quality/intent findings point at routes/lifeos-builderos-command-control-routes.js (/founder-interface/message) + intent services. Replaces the vague 'reproduce then fix' placeholder so discoverSentryFixWork's planner can author real target_file steps.
description: Single source of truth for which BP products are governed by the SENTRY pre-alpha completion gate and what their two doctrine layers are. The generic engine (scripts/sentry-prealpha-gate.mjs) runs any product defined here purely from this config: Layer A structural (no browser) + Layer B human-sim (real browser), both fail-closed, both emitting solution-mandatory findings into a per-product self-fix feed the improvement loop consumes. This generalizes SO-002 beyond Site Builder to every registered product.

layers.name: A+B
layers.note: Delegates to the proven Site Builder composite gate (prep preview -> Layer A structural -> Layer B human-sim -> feed). The engine consumes the feed it emits.

layers.name: A-structural
layers.note: LIVE structural probes for /marketing UI + /api/v1/marketing/* consent→export + intel. Audio named BLOCKED (STORAGE_R2_UNVERIFIED).

layers.name: B-browser
layers.note: Playwright human-sim of /marketing UI + in-browser consent→export loop. Audio named BLOCKED (STORAGE_R2_UNVERIFIED).

layers.name: A-structural
layers.note: LIVE structural probes for /api/v1/lifere-agent-os training, appointment, and teleprompter endpoints. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:3000 when PUBLIC_BASE_URL is absent.

layers.name: B-browser
layers.note: Playwright human-sim of /overlay/lifere-teleprompter.html: load script, advance, interrupt with story, resume with smooth re-entry. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:3000 when PUBLIC_BASE_URL is absent.

layers.name: B-command-key
layers.note: Browser walk with command-key JWT mint — plumbing probe, not founder-credential proof.

layers.name: B-credentialed
layers.note: Founder maturity pre-alpha: real LIFEOS_FOUNDER_LOGIN_* login → JWT → founder chat. Local env OR operator vault proof via COMMAND_CENTER_KEY. Required for CLEARED_FOR_FOUNDER_ALPHA when gate runs with --enforce-creds.

layers.name: B-credentialed-ui
layers.note: True UI form login into lifeos-login.html. Local LIFEOS_FOUNDER_LOGIN_* OR operator vault proof via POST /operator/credentialed-ui-login-proof (Railway Puppeteer — never returns password).
